chunks.text: HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Constitutional Petition No.S-115 of 2025 Present: Justice Jawad Akbar Sarwana Petitioner: M/s Dewan Khalid Textile Mills Ltd Through Mr.Mumtaz Alam Laghari Respondent No.1: Ghulam Rasool s/o Muhammad Hashim Through Mr.Abid Hussain Jamali, Advocate. Nemo. Respondent No.2: Commissioner Workmen’s Compensation and Authority, under Payment of Wages Act. Nemo. Mr.Wali Muhammad Jamari, A.A.G Sindh Date of hearing: 05.11.2025 Date of decision: 11.11.2025 O R D E R JAWAD AKBAR SARWANA, J: For reasons to be recorded, the above- titled petition is dismissed. JUDGE AHSAN K. ABRO
